references.passiveText: There are old shrines scattered across this region, and not all of them are as dormant as people think.
references.triggerDialogue: My mentor used to say the land has a memory, and the shrines are where it speaks. {target_npc} found one {location_hint} that was giving off a faint glow last season: not corruption, but something restless. Could be a spirit trying to communicate, or a warning. Either way, someone with steady nerves should investigate before it becomes a problem.
